Freelance (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $5,314,136Details
International Box Office $1,828,024
Worldwide Box Office $7,142,160
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $462,033
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $132,402
Total $594,435
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Ex-special forces operative Mason Pettis is stuck in a dead-end desk job when he reluctantly takes on a freelance gig to provide private security for washed-up journalist Claire Wellington as she interviews the ruthless—but impeccably dressed—dictator, Juan Venegas. When a military coup breaks out just as she’s about to get the scoop of a lifetime, the unlikely trio must figure out how to survive the jungle, and each other, in order to make it out alive.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$2,086,000 (39.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.55 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:74.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,057 opening theaters/2,057 max. theaters, 2.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $5,809,606

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 27th, 2023 (Wide) by Relativity
International Releases: September 7th, 2023 (Limited) (New Zealand)
September 14th, 2023 (Limited) (Germany)
October 5th, 2023 (Limited) (Brazil)
October 20th, 2023 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
October 27th, 2023 (Wide) (South Africa)
Video Release: November 28th, 2023 by Relativity Media
MPA Rating: R for violence and language.
(Rating bulletin 2770 (cert #54268), 2/15/2023)
Running Time: 109 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Invented Language
Plot point: Coup d’Etat, Out of Retirement, Political, Special Ops
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Ex-special forces operative Mason Pettis is stuck in a dead-end desk job when he reluctantly takes on a freelance gig to provide private security for washed-up journalist Claire Wellington as she interviews the ruthless—but impeccably dressed—dictator, Juan Venegas. When a military coup breaks out just as she’s about to get the scoop of a lifetime, the unlikely trio must figure out how to survive the jungle, and each other, in order to make it out alive.
